steps.title: Compare the starting points
steps.content: Cartographers begin ordering the river system at its lowest point, the Colville River. Hydrologists begin at the top, with source-fed tributaries. The relationship is opposition.

steps.title: Use a contrast transition
steps.content: A signals similarity, B signals an example, and D signals restatement. None fits two groups starting at opposite ends of the river system. The transition must mark contrast. The answer is C.
